name: Onion-Cheese Dip Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a small bowl and stir until well mixed.
2. Spoon the mixture onto a 6-inch square of aluminum foil and fold over to create an airtight package.
3. Label as Onion-Cheese Dip Mix. Store in a cool, dry place and use within 3 to 4 months.
Makes 1 package (about 3 T) of mix. This recipe may be increased to make more packages of mix.
Onion-Cheese Dip:
1. Combine 1 cup sour cream with 1 package of the mix.
2. Chill for at least 1 hour before serving.
Makes about 1 cup of dip.
Variation:
Substitute 1 cup cottage cheese or 1 (8 oz) package of softened cream cheese for sour cream.
